name: Unified Worker Integration Smoke
outcome_goal: Prove the unified workflow worker can execute a local integration job and write deterministic receipts and outputs.

jobs.label: worker_smoke_notification_receipts
jobs.prompt: Send a local in-app notification to prove unified worker execution and receipt persistence.

integration_args.subject: Unified worker smoke receipts
integration_args.body: Verify deterministic receipt ids, workflow output basenames, and receipt authority writes.
